blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,850 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: overcast, highs of 54°F, gusts to 48 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 27".
